message:
Fix macOS build with Homebrew-installed dependencies

Homebrew packages are built with Release configuration only, so their
CMake configs don't export IMPORTED_LOCATION for other configurations.
This caused the linker to emit bare library names like `-lgflags_shared`
instead of full paths, resulting in link failures.

Fix this with two complementary approaches:

1. Set CMAKE_MAP_IMPORTED_CONFIG on macOS to use Release libraries as
   fallback for Debug/RelWithDebInfo builds. Also map to empty string
   to handle packages that only set IMPORTED_LOCATION without config
   suffix.

2. Explicitly find gflags before folly since folly's CMake config
   references gflags_shared in INTERFACE_LINK_LIBRARIES. Manually set
   the missing IMPORTED_LOCATION_* properties for non-Release configs.

This enables building with `macos-xcode-relwithdebinfo` and similar
non-Release presets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -57,6 +57,23 @@ if ("${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME}" STREQUAL "${PROJECT_NAME}")
   endmacro ()
 endif ()
 
+# -- Homebrew configuration mapping --------------------------------------------
+
+# Homebrew packages are typically built with Release configuration only, so
+# their CMake configs only export IMPORTED_LOCATION_RELEASE. When building with
+# other configurations (Debug, RelWithDebInfo), CMake can't find the imported
+# location and falls back to using the target name as a linker flag (e.g.,
+# -lgflags_shared), which fails. This mapping tells CMake to use the Release
+# configuration of imported targets when building other configurations.
+#
+# We also include an empty string "" as a fallback for packages that use
+# config-mode find_package but only set IMPORTED_LOCATION (no config suffix).
+if (APPLE)
+  set(CMAKE_MAP_IMPORTED_CONFIG_DEBUG Release "")
+  set(CMAKE_MAP_IMPORTED_CONFIG_RELWITHDEBINFO Release "")
+  set(CMAKE_MAP_IMPORTED_CONFIG_MINSIZEREL Release "")
+endif ()
+
 # Set a default build type if none was specified.
 set(default_build_type "Release")
 if (EXISTS "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/.git")

@@ -116,6 +116,23 @@ find_package(Boost REQUIRED COMPONENTS headers filesystem url)
 find_package(re2 REQUIRED)
 provide_find_module(re2)
 
+# -- gflags (transitive dependency via folly) ---------------------------------
+
+# folly's CMake config references gflags_shared in INTERFACE_LINK_LIBRARIES.
+# We need to find gflags first and fix its target configuration, because
+# Homebrew gflags only exports IMPORTED_LOCATION_RELEASE.
+find_package(gflags QUIET)
+if(TARGET gflags_shared)
+  get_target_property(_gflags_loc gflags_shared IMPORTED_LOCATION_RELEASE)
+  if(_gflags_loc)
+    set_target_properties(gflags_shared PROPERTIES
+      IMPORTED_LOCATION_RELWITHDEBINFO "${_gflags_loc}"
+      IMPORTED_LOCATION_DEBUG "${_gflags_loc}"
+      IMPORTED_LOCATION_MINSIZEREL "${_gflags_loc}"
+    )
+  endif()
+endif()
+
 # -- folly ---------------------------------------------------------------------
 
 find_package(folly REQUIRED)
